description: What the Outcome Attribution layer (src/outcomes/outcomeAttribution.ts) needs FROM upstream to bind a decision to its real-world result. The connector supplies the longitudinal state via entity_key + measures snapshots.

upstream_requirements.entity_key: date-independent identity — REQUIRED to match before→after snapshots of the same entity
upstream_requirements.before: measures snapshot at decision time (Record<string,string> via metric-registry labels)
upstream_requirements.after: measures snapshot after the action landed
upstream_requirements.signal: the signal that triggered the decision

longitudinal_questions_enabled: How did this work order change over time?
note: before/after are produced by joining two Inbox records on entity_key (not dedupe_key, which is per-snapshot). Measures map to labeled KPIs via metric-registry.
